titleStmt.title: SII 10.483: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 483. (A.R. No. 572 of 1909.) ON A SLAB IN THE TEMPLE OF GŇĆPńÄLASVńÄMI AT THE SAME VILLAGE. Ňö. 1219. (HńďviŠł∑ambi)

summary.p: States that GoŠĻÖgula PŇćchi-NńĀyaka and PerumńĀreŠłćŠłći PŇćtinńďnigńĀru made gifts of land to god GŇćpinńĀtha of Dugya while Rudradńďva, commander of all the forces of the king was governing the country.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
